app.title: Grok Draw Studio
app.subtitle: A Grok-Imagine and OpenAI-compatible image workstation with text-to-image, reference editing, preview, and task reuse.

grokImagine.description: Standard generation mode for most high-quality outputs.

grokImagineEdit.description: Reference editing mode. Upload an image to repaint or refine specific areas.

grokImagineFast.description: Fast generation mode for rapid iterations and sketches.

field.promptPlaceholder: Describe the content, style, lighting, lens, and mood you want to generate or edit
field.uploadHintEdit: Edit mode requires a reference image. Supports PNG / JPG / WebP.
field.uploadHintText: The reference image will be used when switching to an edit model.

tips.title: Prompt Tips
tips.subtitle: Specific descriptions usually lead to more stable results.
items: Subject + scene + style + lighting + lens language gives the most consistent results.
Fast models are for quick sketches; Edit models are for re-creation.
OpenAI Images works best with standard data[].url / b64_json responses.
Click to preview. Cards support favorite, prompt copy, and reuse.

gallery.title: Results
gallery.emptySubtitle: Submit a prompt to see images, model info, and downloads here.

notice.reuse: Parameters restored to the create panel.

error.imageRequired: Edit mode requires a reference image.
error.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please check clipboard permissions.

items: Cinematic, volumetric lighting, ultra-detailed, realistic materials
Minimalist poster design, clean whitespace, modern typography
Cyberpunk night scene, neon reflections, rainy streets, wide-angle lens
High-end product render, studio lighting, clean background
Japanese illustration, soft light and shadow, delicate brushwork, strong atmosphere
Preserve the subject structure, only change colors, outfit, and background style

sample.prompt: A ragdoll cat wearing a transparent space helmet, standing on a neon rooftop, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed
